data.name: Hentai Mommy
data.detailed_description:
🌸 Hentai Mommy is an erotic puzzle game that takes you to a serene Japanese hot spring.
There, a gentle mommy with short dark hair and tender eyes awaits you — surrounded by steam and soft lights, ready to melt your heart... ♨️
Relax, breathe, and surrender to her warmth and affection. 💖




✨ Game Features:


  • 30 relaxing levels — uncover her beauty piece by piece among the soothing lights and hot spring steam!
  • 30 achievements — collect every warm and passionate moment!
  • Gallery — save and admire every erotic illustration anytime you wish!


🎚️ Difficulty Levels:


  • Easy — a soft introduction, gentle and cozy…
  • Normal — feel her warmth growing stronger with every move!
  • Hard — surrender completely to her loving embrace 😉


✨ Look into her tender eyes, feel the steam around you, and let every solved puzzle draw you closer to her sensual warmth. 💋🔥

data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 荷蘭文*, 芬蘭文*, 希臘文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 韓文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 俄文*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 瑞典文*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*, 土耳其文*, 烏克蘭文*, 越南文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 2 GB GeForce or AMD
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
